prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年大连理工大学在海南省综合类最低位次分别为约1738名、1775名、1093名、3396名、555名，波动极大。2023年位次大幅前移至1093名，2024年又骤 降至3396名，2025年进一步前移至555名创历史最佳。近5年位次呈现\"大起大落\"特征，2025年555名为历史极值，反映出该校在海南省报考热度波动剧烈；该 校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021年15人、2022年10人、2023年10人、2024年15人、2025年6人、2026年4人。2026年计划较2025年减少2人（缩招约33%），招 生名额进一步收紧，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第28名，属于全国顶尖工科院校之一。学校 层次高、品牌效应强，对高分考生吸引力持续；2026年声誉评价偏负面（录取断档信号），2024年曾出现投档线异常舆情；抖音热度总排名第55位（较热），短 视频曝光以张雪峰推荐和课程内容为主，整体关注度中等偏上。历史投档异常信号为低关注级别，影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，力学 、土木工程、工商管理、机械工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、软件工程获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程获评A-，共10个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。招生专 业中人工智能、计算机科学与技术等与优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 人工智能、计算机等专业为近年高热方向，社会关注度持续升温。海南省考生总数从2021年52 ,977人持续增长至2025年67,408人，2026年预计约78,000人（较2025年增长约15.7%），考生规模大幅增加，全省竞争加剧。；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，距海南省较远，属于跨省报考。该校在海南省招生人数较少（2026年仅4人），属于小规模招生省份，位次易受少数高分考生报考行为影响而产生 较大波动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次555名已处于历史极值、2026年招生计划缩招33%（名额从6人减至4人）、海南省考生总数大幅增长约15.7%等因素，预计2026年竞争 进一步加剧。但考虑到2025年位次异常靠前（可能受专业组调整影响），2026年位次将有所回落。预测最低位次约474名，区间420–528名。

一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 大连理工大学2026年在海南省综合类仅招2个专业共4人，均为顶尖热门专业。位次在预测区间420–528名内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（420名以内）可 重点冲刺一档王牌专业。由于招生名额极少，报考风险较高，建议同时准备保底院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of Dalian University of Technology in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 1738, 1775, 1093, 3396, and 555, showing extreme fluctuations. In 2023, the ranking significantly advanced to 1093, then plummeted to 3396 in 2024, and further advanced to 555 in 2025, setting a historical best. Over the past 5 years, rankings have shown a pattern of "sharp rises and falls," with 2025's 555 being a historical extreme, reflecting intense volatility in the popularity of this university among Hainan applicants. The enrollment plan for this university in Hainan's comprehensive category: 15 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and 4 in 2026. The 2026 plan is reduced by 2 compared to 2025 (a contraction of about 33%), further tightening admission slots and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, making it one of the top engineering institutions nationwide. The university's high level and strong brand effect continue to attract high-scoring applicants. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (signaling admission cutoff anomalies), with abnormal admission line incidents reported in 2024. Its Douyin popularity ranks 55th overall (relatively hot), with short video exposure mainly featuring Zhang Xuefeng's recommendations and course content, indicating moderate to high overall attention. Historical admission anomaly signals are at a low attention level, with limited impact. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A+, while Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Business Administration, Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A, and Control Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering received A-, totaling 10 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities. Among the admission majors, Artificial Intelligence and Computer Science and Technology are highly correlated with these advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Artificial Intelligence and Computer Science are high-demand fields in recent years, with continuously rising social attention. The total number of applicants in Hainan Province has grown steadily from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, with an estimated 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7% over 2025), significantly expanding the applicant pool and intensifying competition across the province. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, far from Hainan, making it a cross-province application. The university admits a small number of students in Hainan (only 4 in 2026), classifying it as a small-scale enrollment province, where rankings are susceptible to large fluctuations due to the application behavior of a few high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking of 555 is already at a historical extreme, the 2026 enrollment plan is reduced by 33% (from 6 to 4 slots), and the total number of Hainan applicants increases significantly by about 15.7%, competition is expected to intensify further in 2026. However, given that the 2025 ranking is unusually high (possibly influenced by major group adjustments), the 2026 ranking is expected to decline somewhat. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 474, with a range of 420–528.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Discipline Top Talent Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology will admit only 2 majors with a total of 4 students in Hainan's comprehensive category, all of which are top popular majors. For rankings within the predicted range of 420–528, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target and Tier 1 as a stretch. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 420), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. Due to the extremely limited number of admission slots, the application risk is high, so it is advisable to also prepare safety schools.
